blended.narrative: Brian Head is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 20".
